evals.prompt: Review this React dashboard UI for accessibility, responsive behavior, visual hierarchy, and AI-looking patterns. Do not edit code.
evals.expected_output: A read-only frontend review with P0-P3 findings, concrete evidence, user impact, and fix direction, without requiring CLI, hooks, live mode, or external services.

evals.prompt: Polish this landing page. It feels generic and too much like an AI-generated SaaS page.
evals.expected_output: A production-oriented design pass using brand-register guidance, anti-slop bans, typography/color/layout references, and concrete implementation direction.

evals.prompt: Shape the UX for a new onboarding form before implementation.
evals.expected_output: A design brief that asks only necessary clarifying questions, identifies user context, states, edge cases, responsive constraints, and recommended references.
